title: Add SSE endpoint and file-watching change tracker to web server
description:
Add real-time change notification infrastructure to the jit-server:

1. Add `notify` crate for filesystem watching of `.jit/` directory
2. Create `ChangeTracker` module with monotonic version counter and broadcast channel
3. Add SSE endpoint `GET /api/events/stream` that streams `{"version": N}` on changes
4. Add `GET /api/changes` endpoint returning current version
5. Debounce filesystem events (~200ms) to coalesce burst writes
6. Update `AppState` to carry both `CommandExecutor` and `ChangeTracker`

New files: `crates/server/src/watcher.rs`, `crates/server/src/sse.rs`
Modified: `Cargo.toml`, `lib.rs`, `main.rs`, `routes.rs`
